subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved of my heart and remembered in my soul, who standeth before the gate of my Lord! There hath come upon this servant that which [3.5s]... ...I beseech Thee, O Possessor of all names and Creator of the heavens, to ordain for Thy Afnán that which will protect him from all else besides Thee, and to bestow upon him a measure of Thy patience
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی و المذکور فی قلبی و القائم لدی باب مولای قد ورد علی الخادم ما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
